name: Welcome Onboarding
description: Sends a welcome email and in-app notification to new users.

body.en:
Welcome, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}!

Thanks for joining {{.Payload.appName}}. We're glad to have you.

Get started by visiting your dashboard.
body.fr:
Bienvenue, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}} !

Merci d'avoir rejoint {{.Payload.appName}}.

Commencez en visitant votre tableau de bord.
body.pt:
Bem-vindo, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}!

Obrigado por se juntar ao {{.Payload.appName}}.

Comece visitando o seu painel.
body.de:
Willkommen, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}!

Danke, dass Sie sich bei {{.Payload.appName}} angemeldet haben.

Besuchen Sie Ihr Dashboard, um loszulegen.
body.it:
Benvenuto, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}!

Grazie per esserti unito a {{.Payload.appName}}.

Inizia visitando la tua dashboard.

content.en: Welcome to {{.Payload.appName}}, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}. Explore your dashboard to get started.
content.fr: Bienvenue sur {{.Payload.appName}}, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}. Explorez votre tableau de bord pour commencer.
content.pt: Bem-vindo ao {{.Payload.appName}}, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}. Explore o painel para começar.
content.de: Willkommen bei {{.Payload.appName}}, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}. Erkunden Sie Ihr Dashboard.
content.it: Benvenuto su {{.Payload.appName}}, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}. Esplora la dashboard per iniziare.
content.es: Bienvenido a {{.Payload.appName}}, {{.Subscriber.FirstName}}. Explora tu panel para empezar.
